transcript: This place in Thailand stole the name from Spongebob. Krabi, located off the west coast of the country, has multiple insanely beautiful characteristics that you can't find anywhere else. Not only does it have the most colorful water on Earth, but it also has some of the best greenery in the world. All they gotta do is find a more original name.
